channel.title: Fallout Lorecast - The Fallout Video Game & TV Lore Podcast
channel.copyright: Copyright Robots Radio unless otherwise stated.
channel.itunes:author: Robots Radio
channel.itunes:summary: In the top 0.5% of podcasts globally and the most popular Fallout podcast, this series fills in all the details about the Fallout world beginning with the Great War in 2077 and progressing through major world events, factions, creatures, technology, and each vault. We'll explore what we know, and speculate about what might be. This show begins as a solo production, detailing specific topics, and grows into so much more. Get awesome rewards & support the show: patreon.com/falloutlorecast Watch live at youtube.com/c/robotsradio Advertise with us & business inquiries: robotsnetwork@gmail.com
channel.description:
Fallout TV Season 2 Breakdown starts at Episode 384 with a breakdown of every major and minor detail, Easter Eggs, and predictions. Check it out!

In the top 0.5% of podcasts globally and the most popular Fallout podcast, this series fills in all the details about the Fallout world beginning with the Great War in 2077 and progressing through major world events, factions, creatures, technology, and each vault. We'll explore what we know, and speculate about what might be. This show begins as a solo production, detailing specific topics, and grows into so much more.

Get awesome rewards & support the show: patreon.com/falloutlorecast

Watch live at youtube.com/c/robotsradio

Check out my new show, RETRO RECALL: https://youtu.be/Ur6qFVBA9zE

Advertise with us & business inquiries: robotsnetwork@gmail.com

item.itunes:title: 393: Fallout Fan Film "Kill 'em Kindly" Interview w/ Producer Sam Conde
item.title: 393: Fallout Fan Film "Kill 'em Kindly" Interview w/ Producer Sam Conde
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Finished season 2 of the Fallout TV show and still looking for more to watch? I've got good news. Kill 'em Kindly is a fan film releasing soon. The team loves Fallout and we get a special behind-the-scenes interview with producer Sam Conde to find out more about their new vault and why their vault-dweller is braving the wasteland.
item.description:
Finished season 2 of the Fallout TV show and still looking for more to watch? I've got good news. Kill 'em Kindly is a fan film releasing soon. The team loves Fallout and we get a special behind-the-scenes interview with producer Sam Conde to find out more about their new vault and why their vault-dweller is braving the wasteland.

Kill 'em Kindly: https://www.killemkindly.info/

item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: This week, what does "canon" really mean?
item.description:
Welcome to the new extra content! These are extra episodes where I'll take on a topic or a "what if" scenario while I drive.

This week, what does "canon" really mean?

Thoughts? Chime in on the Robots Radio Discord: discord.gg/JXKfVhM

Please note that I've cleaned up the audio as best as I could. I hope you enjoy!

item.itunes:title: 300: The 300th Episode Celebration w/ Special Guests
item.title: 300: The 300th Episode Celebration w/ Special Guests
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Wes Johnson, Tooniveral, Jessica Star, Brad (Once Upon a Wasteland), Lawrence (MODUS Files), Follower Toshi, SpookieSkullie, Chip Monk, Preston (True Vault Escapades), and Laney join me to talk about 300 episodes, content creation, our love of Fallout, and hopes for the future.
item.description:
Wes Johnson, Tooniveral, Jessica Star, Brad (Once Upon a Wasteland), Lawrence (MODUS Files), Follower Toshi, SpookieSkullie, Chip Monk, Preston (True Vault Escapades), and Laney join me to talk about 300 episodes, content creation, our love of Fallout, and hopes for the future.

item.itunes:title: 289: Fallout 1 & 2 Are Weirder Than You Remember
item.title: 289: Fallout 1 & 2 Are Weirder Than You Remember
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: We seem to forget how strange and silly the original Fallout games could be. Let's take a look at some of the weirdest parts of Fallout 1 and 2.
item.description:

item.itunes:title: 214: The Legion's REAL Philosophy
item.title: 214: The Legion's REAL Philosophy
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: It's easy to see the Roman influence in Caesar's Legion, but there's a lesser-known philosophy underpinning Caesar's goals. His justifications may sound good at first, but let's dig into his flawed use of the Hegelian Dialectic. Don't worry, I'll explain.
item.description:
It's easy to see the Roman influence in Caesar's Legion, but there's a lesser-known philosophy underpinning Caesar's goals. His justifications may sound good at first, but let's dig into his flawed use of the Hegelian Dialectic. Don't worry, I'll explain.

item.itunes:title: 211: Helios One: Weaponizing the Sun
item.title: 211: Helios One: Weaponizing the Sun
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: HELIOS One is a pre-War Poseidon Energy concentrated solar power plant that used to, and potentially still could, generate and provide power to the New Vegas Strip and the regional power grid. It also contains the control system for two experimental satellite weapon systems, ARCHIMEDES and ARCHIMEDES II.
item.description:
HELIOS One is a pre-War Poseidon Energy concentrated solar power plant that used to, and potentially still could, generate and provide power to the New Vegas Strip and the regional power grid. It also contains the control system for two experimental satellite weapon systems, ARCHIMEDES and ARCHIMEDES II.

item.itunes:title: 183: What If... The Bombs Never Dropped? w/ Dave Chaffins
item.title: 183: What If... The Bombs Never Dropped? w/ Dave Chaffins
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: What would happen if the bombs never fell? Let's go back to the year 2077. The war is at its peak. The US & China are invading each other's land. The US is experimenting on soldiers with the FEV. Vault-Tec is ready and waiting to fill the vaults. The members of the Enclave are all set for a government takeover. And there's no nuclear explosion... Does this create a better scenario for the USA? For the world? What happens next?
item.itunes:summary:

item.itunes:title: 181: How would YOU Survive the Wasteland? Patron Chat Jan, 2022
item.title: 181: How would YOU Survive the Wasteland? Patron Chat Jan, 2022
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Imagine that Fallout is real. You're thrust out into the wasteland. No home. No vault. No faction. Nowhere to run to for safety. Just you and your wits. What do you do to survive? And we're talking about YOU, not some avatar or video game character. What do YOU do to survive in the wasteland of Fallout? Our patrons join me this week to discuss this harrowing scenario.
item.itunes:summary:
Imagine that Fallout is real. You're thrust out into the wasteland. No home. No vault. No faction. Nowhere to run to for safety. Just you and your wits. What do you do to survive? And we're talking about YOU, not some avatar or video game character. What do YOU do to survive in the wasteland of Fallout? Our patrons join me this week to discuss this harrowing scenario. Subscribe for more Fallout Lorecast Podcast episodes!

item.itunes:title: 180: (Game) Captain Robots' New Vegas Adventures EP 1
item.title: 180: (Game) Captain Robots' New Vegas Adventures EP 1
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Captain Robots begins a new adventure in New Vegas. Join Robots as he Role Plays his ways through the classic Fallout game with a 10 Luck build, making decisions based on what his character would do, not on previous knowledge about the world or min/maxing the systems. What will happen? How will things turn out?

item.itunes:title: 179: Aliens: Are they "Canon?"
item.title: 179: Aliens: Are they "Canon?"
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Ever since we got the Mothership Zeta expansion for Fallout 3, the internet has been debating the "canonization" of aliens in Fallout. With the upcoming expansion event coming to Fallout 76, focusing on aliens invading Appalachia, the debate has been reborn. Let's take a look at all of the places aliens have shown up in the games, and determine how "canon" they are or aren't.

item.itunes:title: 178: Paladin Rahmani's Journey
item.title: 178: Paladin Rahmani's Journey
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Paladin Rahmani's story begins before the Great War, on the West Coast near the Mariposa Military Base. After the bombs fall, she meets a man named Roger Maxon, and her life is changed forever when she's commissioned with an expedition to cross the United States. But the journey will take its toll.

item.itunes:title: 175: What if... The Scorched Plague Never Happened? w/ Lawrence (The MODUS Files) & Brad (Once Upon a Wasteland)
item.title: 175: What if... The Scorched Plague Never Happened? w/ Lawrence (The MODUS Files) & Brad (Once Upon a Wasteland)
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: So much of Fallout 76's story and events before Vault 76's doors open revolve around the Scorched Plague and the inability of the residents of West Virginia to fight off the Scorched and come together peacefully for a solution to the problem. What if the Scorched Plague never happened? How would Fallout 76 change? What kind of Appalachia would we have entered into in the game instead?
item.itunes:summary:

item.description:
So much of Fallout 76's story and events before Vault 76's doors open revolve around the Scorched Plague and the inability of the residents of West Virginia to fight off the Scorched and come together peacefully for a solution to the problem. What if the Scorched Plague never happened? How would Fallout 76 change? What kind of Appalachia would we have entered into in the game instead? Subscribe for more Fallout Lorecast Podcast episodes! item.itunes:title: 174: What if the Institute Helped the Commonwealth? Patron Chat Nov, 2021
item.title: 174: What if the Institute Helped the Commonwealth? Patron Chat Nov, 2021
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: What if the Institute was "above board" and attempted to be morally upright? What if they communicated clearly with the people of the Commonwealth? What if they were clear about their attempts to help humanity and brought in outsiders, and expanded outward to help others? How would that have changed the events of Fallout 4?
item.itunes:summary:

item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Ellen, from Role to Cast, join Tom to discuss the NEW official Fallout Table Top Role Play Game system. Role to Cast is a real play podcast from Baby Beard Media on the Robots Radio network. They play many different TTRPG systems, so Ellen's take on the new Fallout TTRPG comes from a place of experience. They discuss the mechanics, races, SPECIAL, and more.

Let's talk more about the lore behind Nipton in Fallout New Vegas. Subscribe for more Fallout Lorecast Podcast episodes! item.itunes:title: Why West Virginia? w/ Dave from The Fallout Hub
item.title: Why West Virginia? w/ Dave from The Fallout Hub
item.itunes:author: Robots Radio
item.itunes:subtitle: Very soon, we'll all be stepping back into Fallout 76 to see how Wastelanders holds up. So that got me thinking... why West Virginia? So I reached out to my buddy Dave, local expert on Appalachian studies.
item.itunes:summary:

item.itunes:summary:
We interrupt your regular podcast programming to bring you a Robots Radio Network Halloween Spooktacular! Kenneth Vigue from CHAD: A Fallout 76 Story and the hosts of the Robots Radio Network invite you to a 2 part Halloween Special! Mr. Robots himself from the Fallout Lorecast will be inviting us to his secluded estate in Maine. There, we'll be broadcasting live 10 tales of terror...from real-life supernatural experiences to our favorite short stories. But there is also something dark going on in this house. Who will survive? Brought to you by: Storyblocks.com: Storyblocks.com/robotsradio
